name: movie-booking-system-monolith
description: Full stack movie booking system deployed as a single unit

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../BMS-Frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd BMS-Frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm install && rm -rf dist && cp -r ../BMS-Frontend/dist .
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && nodemon index.js" "cd BMS-Frontend && npm run dev"
